task_completion.description: Open the wind_sensitivity.ork file in OpenRocket
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket application window is visible, showing the rocket design (Two stage high power rocket) loaded from '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/wind_sensitivity.ork'.
The 'Flight simulations' tab in OpenRocket displays a list of at least 6 distinct simulation entries.

task_completion.description: Configure simulations with varying average wind speeds from 0 m/s to at least 10 m/s
task_completion.visual_evidence: Simulation edit dialogs, renamed simulation titles, or the final exported data showing at least 5 distinct non-zero wind speeds and a 0 m/s wind speed, with the maximum reaching at least 9.9 m/s.

task_completion.description: Export the comparison data to wind_sensitivity.csv
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog, file manager, terminal, or spreadsheet application showing the file '/home/ga/Documents/exports/wind_sensitivity.csv' containing columns for wind speed, apogee, and ground hit distance.

task_completion.description: Write a launch readiness report summarizing wind impacts and recommending a max wind speed threshold
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing '/home/ga/Documents/exports/wind_report.txt' with text summarizing how wind speed affects flight parameters (apogee/ground hit distance) and explicitly stating a recommended maximum wind speed threshold for launch.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenRocket GUI to run the simulations and generate data
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenRocket application (e.g., 'Flight simulations' tab, 'Edit simulation' dialogs, 'Export' dialogs) rather than just manually typing fake data into a CSV file.

integrity.description: The report contains genuine analysis based on the simulation data
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in wind_report.txt references actual trends or data points (e.g., specific apogee drops or drift distances) rather than generic placeholder text or copy-pasted prompt instructions.

integrity.description: Files were saved to the exact requested directory
integrity.visual_evidence: File paths in the text editor, file manager, or terminal explicitly show '/home/ga/Documents/exports/' as the location for both the CSV and TXT files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct rocket file is '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/wind_sensitivity.ork' (which contains the 'Two stage high power rocket' design). The agent must create at least 6 simulations. The wind speeds must include 0 m/s and at least 5 distinct non-zero values, with the maximum wind speed being at least 9.9 m/s. The exported CSV must be located at '/home/ga/Documents/exports/wind_sensitivity.csv' and the report at '/home/ga/Documents/exports/wind_report.txt'.
